query:
SELECT 'Clientes - Manual' as tipo, COUNT(*) as cantidad FROM clients WHERE dataOrigin = 'manual'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Clientes - Sistema', COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE dataOrigin = 'system'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Citas - Manual', COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE dataOrigin = 'manual'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Citas - Sistema', COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE dataOrigin = 'system'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Asesoramientos', COUNT(*) FROM advisoryRequests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Cotizaciones', COUNT(*) FROM quotations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Proyectos', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Tareas', COUNT(*) FROM tasks;
